content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 4, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 4, 2026, saw significant expansion of the ElizaOS ecosystem, headlined by the integration of `plugin-slack` into the monorepo and major advancements in cloud-based monetization and automation workflows. Development focused on refining the n8n-workflow experience, stabilizing cloud authentication flows, and introducing extensive LifeOps capabilities.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Monetization**
*   Implemented support for monetized container app domains, including comprehensive updates to auth, domain management, and deployment status handling ([#7376](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7376)).
*   Resolved multiple frontend issues, including CLI-login deadlocks ([#7367](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7367), [#7377](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7377)), billing fetch loops ([#7374](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7374)), and steward session flow repairs ([#7361](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7361), [#7360](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7360), [#7359](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7359)).
*   Consolidated Pages Functions and improved API routing for cloud services ([#7358](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7358), [#7357](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7357)).

**Plugin Integration & Workflow Enhancements**
*   Migrated `@elizaos/plugin-slack` into the monorepo ([#7375](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7375)).
*   Enhanced n8n-workflow capabilities with structured clarification requests, improved prompt rules, and better handling of prose-trailed JSON responses ([#7373](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7373), [#7372](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7372), [#7369](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7369)).
*   Added LifeOps code and analysis modules, including extractors for life goals, health, and scheduling ([#7356](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7356)).

**Automation & Agent Stability**
*   Improved `AutomationsView` UI with inline clarification panels and fixed trigger deletion bugs ([#7341](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7341), [#7340](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7340)).
*   Added support for free-form clarifications in the n8n resolve flow ([#7370](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7370)).
*   Fixed agent configuration issues by skipping vault sentinels during environment variable application ([#7368](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7368)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7379](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7379): Dependency update for `hono` in container-control-plane.
*   [#7378](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7378): Fix to preserve `agentEntry.settings` in `buildCharacterFromConfig()`.
*   [#7348](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7348): Update `typescript` to v5.9.3.
*   *Note: Several dependency PRs ([#7349](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7349) - [#7353](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7353)) were autoclosed.*

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Integration Proposals**
*   [#7366](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7366): Integration proposal for CAJAL, a specialized scientific paper generation character, was reviewed and closed.

## NEW ISSUES

**Agent Runtime & Orchestration**
*   [#7362](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7362): Agents hallucinate missing task/memory infrastructure; Hyperscape app conflicts with agent list installation.
*   [#7364](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7364): Telegram wrapper bypasses agent runtime, resulting in lack of action/skill dispatch.
*   [#7365](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7365): `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag fails to bypass confirmation loops in SwarmCoordinator subprocesses.

**UI & Performance**
*   [#7363](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7363): Activity panel experiences flickering under high-volume WebSocket events due to lack of state coalescing.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues currently meet the criteria of having more than 3 comments.*
